name: qutip
tagline: Reference skill teaching QuTiP (Quantum Toolbox in Python) usage for simulating open/closed quantum systems, solvers, and visualization.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill. Only shell command is a standard `uv pip install qutip` from PyPI (line 17) — no piped remote scripts, no network egress, no secrets touched, no sudo. Description clearly states when to use it and explicitly excludes circuit-based quantum computing use cases. Safe to install.
